---
title: "Recipe Book"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    highlight: null
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Recipe Book}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Menu Notes

This section contains documentation from previous versions of DPmixGPD.
These vignettes are preserved for reference and may not reflect the
current API exactly.

> **Note**: For the most up-to-date documentation, please refer to the
> [Pantry](manual-index.html) section.

## Starters

- [**Starter Broth (Start Here)**](cookbook/v00-start-here.html) - Original quick start guide
- [**Chef's Notes (Introduction)**](cookbook/v01-introduction.html) - Package overview and motivation
- [**Spice Rack Sampler (Distributions)**](cookbook/v02-available-distributions.html) - Distribution catalog with visualizations

## Entrees

- [**Mainline Sear (Compile & Run)**](cookbook/v03-basic-model-compile-run.html) - Step-by-step model building
- [**Two-Oven Roast (Backends)**](cookbook/v04-backends-and-workflow.html) - CRP vs SB backend comparison

## Mains (Unconditional)

- [**Classic Stew (CRP)**](cookbook/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Basic CRP mixture model
- [**Extended Braise (CRP Extended)**](cookbook/v06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Extended CRP examples with diagnostics
- [**Layered Lasagna (SB)**](cookbook/v07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html) - Stick-Breaking mixture model
- [**Tail-Spice Chili (GPD CRP)**](cookbook/v08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html) - CRP with GPD tail
- [**Tail-Spice Bake (GPD SB)**](cookbook/v09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html) - Stick-Breaking with GPD tail

## Sides (Conditional)

- [**Seasoned Sides (CRP)**](cookbook/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Conditional CRP mixture
- [**Stirred Layers (SB)**](cookbook/v11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html) - Conditional Stick-Breaking mixture
- [**Citrus Tart (GPD CRP)**](cookbook/v12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html) - Conditional CRP with GPD tail
- [**Glazed Side (GPD SB)**](cookbook/v13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html) - Conditional Stick-Breaking with GPD tail

## Desserts (Causal)

- [**Simple Sweet (No Covariates)**](cookbook/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html) - Causal inference without confounders
- [**Layer Cake (With Covariates)**](cookbook/v15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html) - Causal inference with covariates
- [**Twin Scoops (Same Backend CRP)**](cookbook/v16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html) - Treatment/control with same CRP backend
- [**Twin Parfaits (Same Backend SB)**](cookbook/v17-causal-same-backend-SB.html) - Treatment/control with same SB backend
- [**Two-Style Tasting (Different CRP)**](cookbook/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html) - Mixed backend causal analysis
- [**Split Plating (Different SB)**](cookbook/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html) - Mixed backend causal analysis

## Kitchen Notes

- [**Fix-It Fry (Troubleshooting)**](cookbook/v20-troubleshooting.html) - Common issues and solutions

## Why This Recipe Book?

These vignettes were created during earlier development phases and
contain valuable detailed examples. While the core concepts remain
valid, some function names, arguments, or workflows may have changed.
Always check the current
[Manual](manual-index.html) and [Function
Reference](../reference/index.html) for the latest API.
